title: Generalist AI Trainer (Visual Content)
about: As a Generalist AI Trainer (Visual Content), you will contribute to the development and evaluation of advanced AI systems by working with image‑based content under clearly defined guidelines.
lookingFor: Strong attention to detail and the ability to follow structured, nuanced guidelines
Comfortable working with visual content and applying consistent judgment across tasks
Able to clearly explain decisions when required and incorporate feedback effectively
Reliable, self‑directed, and able to manage time responsibly in a remote environment
Comfortable using online tools and platforms to complete assigned work
Willingness to learn, adapt, and improve through training and review cycles
Commitment to quality, accuracy, and consistency over speed
compensation: Market‑range, based on experience, location, and workload.

title: Legal & Compliance AI Specialist
about: As a Legal & Compliance AI Specialist, you will directly improve the accuracy, safety, and jurisdictional rigor of AI in legal research, contract analysis, and regulatory compliance.
lookingFor: A JD, LLB, LLM, or equivalent law degree. Admission to a bar or equivalent professional qualification is highly desirable.
Practical experience in a law firm, in‑house legal team, regulatory body, or legal tech / compliance function.
Strong command of at least one legal system (common law or civil law); familiarity with cross‑border practice is a plus.
Specialized experience in an area such as corporate / M&A, contracts, IP, data privacy (GDPR / CCPA / PIPL), financial regulation, or litigation.
Exceptional writing, analytical reasoning, and citation discipline, with a keen eye for detail.
compensation: $60‑$140 USD per hour, depending on jurisdictional expertise.

title: Clinical Medicine AI Specialist
about: As a Clinical Medicine AI Specialist, you will directly improve the accuracy and safety of AI in clinical reasoning, diagnostic support, and patient‑facing health information.
lookingFor: A medical degree (MD, MBBS, or equivalent) or advanced degree (MSc / PhD) in a clinical or biomedical field.
Practical clinical experience in a hospital, clinic, or academic medical centre.
Deep understanding of clinical guidelines, medical terminology (ICD‑10/11, SNOMED CT, LOINC) and evidence‑based medicine.
Strong analytical and critical‑reasoning skills with rigorous attention to detail.
Commitment to patient privacy, data de‑identification standards, and clinical ethics.
compensation: $70‑$150 USD per hour, based on expertise and specialization.

title: Photoshop AI Specialist
about: We are seeking highly skilled Photoshop experts to join RemoExperts’ global community, working on creative and AI‑driven image editing projects requiring precision, artistry, and consistency.
lookingFor: Proficiency in Adobe Photoshop (advanced level).
Strong sense of aesthetics, color, and composition.
Excellent attention to detail and consistency.
Ability to follow complex visual instructions precisely.
Reliable internet and time‑management skills.
compensation: $45‑$65 USD per hour, based on projects and skill sets.

title: Generalist AI Trainer
about: Directly responsible for improving the quality, safety, and intelligence of cutting‑edge AI models through high‑quality training data creation and evaluation.
lookingFor: Native or near‑native fluency in English with exceptional writing and communication skills.
Proven experience as an AI Trainer, Data Annotator, or similar role.
Strong analytical and critical‑thinking skills with a high degree of attention to detail.
Broad general knowledge across various subjects.
Ability to work independently, manage time effectively, and meet deadlines in a remote setting.
Commitment to quality and adaptability to evolving project guidelines.
compensation: $30‑$65 USD per hour, depending on experience and workload.

title: Function‑based Code Annotator
about: Design and develop high‑quality, function‑level algorithm problems covering a wide range of algorithms and data structures, with bilingual (Chinese & English) descriptions.
lookingFor: Experience creating problems for programming competitions (ICPC, Codeforces, etc.).
Expertise in algorithms and data structures, with specialization in at least one area (graph theory, DP, strings, etc.).
Proficient in Python or C/C++ for writing validators and reference solutions.
Strong problem‑abstraction skills to transform vague ideas into clear algorithmic statements.
Background in CS, software engineering, mathematics, or AI research.
compensation: USD $120‑$150 per day, based on skills and experience.

title: Repo‑based Code Annotator
about: Build reproducible, standardized test environments using Docker and enhance unit‑test coverage for benchmark tasks.
lookingFor: Proficient in Linux command line, shell scripting, and tools like grep, sed, awk, curl, jq.
Expert in Python for writing test harnesses and automation tools.
Experience with Docker (writing Dockerfiles, building images).
Familiarity with testing frameworks such as pytest.
Background in CS, software engineering, or related fields.
compensation: USD $80‑$120 per day, dependent on skill level.

title: Actuarial & Insurance AI Partner
about: Ensure the actuarial logic of AI models is sound and risk assessments are accurate for insurance industry applications.
lookingFor: Degree in Actuarial Science, Statistics, or Mathematics; professional credentials (ASA, FSA).
Experience in P&C, life, or health insurance with background in pricing, underwriting, or reserving.
Proficiency in risk modeling and statistical analysis.
Exceptional attention to detail and ability to work with complex rules and data.
compensation: $70‑$150 USD per hour, based on specialization and experience.

title: Financial Analyst AI Specialist
about: Improve the accuracy and depth of AI in financial statement analysis, market forecasting, and risk assessment.
lookingFor: Degree in Finance, Economics, or related field; certifications such as CFA or FRM are a plus.
Practical experience in investment banking, asset management, or equity research.
Deep understanding of financial statements, valuation models, and macroeconomics.
Strong logical and analytical skills with a keen eye for detail.
compensation: $70‑$150 USD per hour, reflecting expertise and specialization.
